system.description: Despite their woeful inaccuracy, you are quite deadly with a black powder firearm. You get a Bonus Die on all damage rolls with a firearm and increase their range increments by 10’. It takes 2 Fortune Points to turn your shot into a Close Call; 1 Fortune Point merely halves the damage. As an alternative, you can take this Boon to be a Crack Shot with a different ranged weapon, such as crossbows.
